NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS (TRANSACTION ID # 210027212) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2023 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF PLAINTIFFS NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO COMPEL (TRANSACTION ID # 210031884) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED WRITTEN RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S (1) FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL (SERVED AUGUST 22, 2022); (2) FORM INTERROGATORIES - EMPLOYMENT (SERVED AUGUST 22, 2022); (3) SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SERVED AUGUST 25, 2022), AND (4) REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SERVED AUGUST 25, 2022) WITHIN TEN CALENDAR DAYS OF THE ENTRY THIS ORDER AND PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS THEREAFTER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,537.50 [9 HOURS @ $300/HR PLUS 2.5 HOURS @ $335/HR), PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WITHIN 30 CALENDAR DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT RMEAD@FOLGERLEVIN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Vacated

Defendant The Culinary Edge'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions, Or In The Alternative, Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Defendant THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC's Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions, Or In The Alternative, Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Defendant THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC's Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions, Or In The Alternative, Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions is transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (room 301) on the same date at 9:30 a.m.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR TERMINATING AND MONETARY SANCTIONS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, EVIDENTIARY AND MONETARY SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING AND MONETARY SANCTIONS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, EVIDENTIARY AND MONETARY SANCTIONS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion for terminating sanctions for Plaintiff's failure to respond to discovery and comply with the Court's prior order compelling discovery and awarding a monetary sanction is granted. Plaintiff's case is dismissed with prejudice. Defendant's request for additional monetary sanctions is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at rmead@folgerlevin.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE CULINARY EDGE, LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery Requests.

Defendant's unopposed motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve verified written responses without objections to Defendant's (1) Form Interrogatories - General (served August 22, 2022); (2) Form Interrogatories - Employment (served August 22, 2022); (3) Special Interrogatories (served August 25, 2022), and (4) Requests for Production of Documents (served August 25, 2022) within ten calendar days of the entry this order and produce responsive documents within 20 calendar days thereafter. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $3,537.50 [9 hours @ $300/hr plus 2.5 hours @ $335/hr), payable to Defendant's counsel within 30 calendar days of entry of this order.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order in word format that is verbatim with the Court's ruling directly to the Judge Pro Tem at rmead@folgerlevin.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Robert Ottinger, Esq. (415.262.0096; as Moving Party for Plaintiff.
Marie Holvick, Esq. (415.986.5900; mholvick@grsm.com) of Gordon Rees Scully Manukhani LLP for Defendant, the Culinary Edge, LLC.
Mel Cole, Esq. (no information provided) for Co-Defendants, United Health Services.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF MAUREEN SIMMONS is GRANTED.

**Moving party to submit a new proposed order to include the missing items on the Judicial Council form.**

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
